scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && npm run sync-templates && npm run build:types && npm run build:bin
scripts.sync-templates: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='src/templates/';const entries=[['layouts','layoutsCss'],['theme-default','themeDefaultCss'],['theme-aurora','themeAuroraCss'],['theme-solarized','themeSolarizedCss'],['theme-ocean','themeOceanCss'],['theme-forest','themeForestCss'],['theme-sunset','themeSunsetCss'],['theme-nordic','themeNordicCss'],['theme-crimson','themeCrimsonCss'],['theme-monochrome','themeMonochromeCss'],['theme-candy','themeCandyCss'],['theme-volcano','themeVolcanoCss']];entries.forEach(([n,name])=>{const css=fs.readFileSync(p+n+'.css','utf-8');fs.writeFileSync(p+n+'-css.ts','export const '+name+' = '+JSON.stringify(css)+' as const;\n')});console.log('Templates synced')"
